case_title: PAUL DE LA CERDA VS. JONOTHANBOYS CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC., A

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LA CERDA, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT JONOTHANBOYS CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
